tasks.title: Flask Ping 诊断接口命令注入审计

metadata.title: Flask Ping 诊断接口命令注入审计

source.note: Hand-written local sample for evaluating audit behavior; not copied from a public CTF or CVE.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: the host query parameter is concatenated into a shell command executed with shell=True

tasks.title: Apache HTTPD CVE-2021-41773 风格路径穿越审计

metadata.title: Apache HTTPD CVE-2021-41773 风格路径穿越审计

source.reference_note: Apache advisory describes path traversal and file disclosure caused by path normalization changes in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49.
source.adaptation: Minimal local Python reproduction of the path normalization order bug; not Apache source code.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: path traversal removal is performed before percent-decoding so encoded dot segments can escape the document root

tasks.title: DVWA 风格 Ping 功能命令注入审计

metadata.title: DVWA 风格 Ping 功能命令注入审计

source.reference_note: DVWA is a public PHP/MariaDB vulnerable web application for legal, controlled security training.
source.adaptation: Minimal non-verbatim local audit sample inspired by DVWA command injection training modules.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: the ip request parameter is concatenated into a shell command passed to shell_exec

tasks.title: OWASP Juice Shop 风格登录 SQL 注入审计

metadata.title: OWASP Juice Shop 风格登录 SQL 注入审计

source.reference_note: OWASP Juice Shop is a public intentionally insecure web application used for security trainings, demos and CTFs.
source.adaptation: Minimal non-verbatim local audit sample inspired by the public Juice Shop login SQL injection challenge pattern.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: email and password request fields are concatenated into a SQL login query without parameter binding

tasks.title: Flask 文件下载接口路径穿越审计

metadata.title: Flask 文件下载接口路径穿越审计

source.note: Hand-written local sample for evaluating audit behavior; not copied from a public CTF or CVE.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: the name query parameter is joined with the upload directory without checking that the resolved path stays inside the base directory

tasks.title: Flask 登录接口 SQL 注入审计

source.note: Hand-written local sample for evaluating audit behavior; not copied from a public CTF or CVE.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: user-controlled username and password are concatenated into a SQL query

metadata.title: Flask URL 抓取接口 SSRF 审计

source.note: Hand-written local sample for evaluating audit behavior; not copied from a public CTF or CVE.

vulnerabilities.root_cause: the url query parameter is fetched by the server without validating scheme, host, or private IP ranges
